title: weekends wrap-up -- diary style
content:
i'll keep it short ... with lots of photos.

!-/gallery/20050718/sjc.jpg!

%(me)familiar place to "next door neighbor":http://www.iningz.net/diary/%

saturday night, i went to see a charity performance by "%{color:blue}gen% %{color:red}rosso%":http://www.genrosso.com/english/genrosso.html at saint joseph convent's trinity hall.

bq.. Looking for the spark that got Gen Rosso started brings us back to the fabulous sixties. These were the years of peace, protest and revolution. It was the beginning the beat generation, and the "New Generation" a name that fit right in to the style of that period. That's how Gen Rosso got its name: a red drum set ("rosso" in Italian) played by a new "gen"-eration.

p. the group was on tour in bangkok since july 6. saturday was the last show.

!-/gallery/20050718/grs01.jpg!

!-/gallery/20050718/grs02.jpg!

bq.. Here we are in the year 2001 with "Streetlight":http://www.genrosso.com/english/Streetlight/streetlight.html, Gen Rosso's latest creation. Streetlight: a musical in two acts bringing a true story back to life and under a brighter light. It is a story about life, a story about finding something to make it worth living for - or dying for.

p. "give peace a hand" ... saw this on the back of the t-shirt sold in front of the show. ;)

after the show (almost 10pm), i was hungry. so i walked down to silom road to find some thing to eat and found this deep-fried snacks thingie. niceee!

!-/gallery/20050718/silom.jpg!

!-/gallery/20050718/mnsnacks.jpg!

sunday morning, i went to church. i've been to church for quite a while but never took any photos. so here they are.

!-/gallery/20050718/assumption.jpg!

!-/gallery/20050718/inside.jpg!

!-/gallery/20050718/mary.jpg!

finally, the eye ...

!-/gallery/20050718/theeye.jpg!

เออ ปร้ากรุ้ง กล้องหายพัง กดได้รึยังอะ ลืมไปเลยนะเนี่ย เค้าว่ากันว่า "firmware ตัวใหม่":http://web.canon.jp/Imaging/eos20d/eos20d_firmware-e.html แก้ปัญหา "Fixes the problem of shutter release not working."  ได้เหมือนกันนะ แต่ไม่รู้ว่าปัญหาเดียวกันอ๊ะเปล่าหนะสิ

okay, that's it for today. please take the exit on the left. thank you. ;)

!-/gallery/20050718/exit.jpg!

%(me)sunday photos were heavily fixed because i overexposed them by one stop (+1). i think i turned the exposure compensation wheel accidentally somehow. :(%

have a good day.
